description_long: A male security guard is depicted standing upright, dressed in a formal dark suit with a matching jacket and trousers. He wears a white collared shirt and a striped tie, giving him a professional and authoritative appearance suitable for urban environments. His shoes are black and formal, complementing the rest of his attire. The guard's hair is neatly styled, and his facial expression is neutral, conveying alertness and readiness. No visible security badge, insignia, or specialized equipment is present on his uniform. The overall look is that of a corporate or private security guard, blending seamlessly into business or public settings.
description: A male security guard in a dark suit, white shirt, and striped tie, standing upright with a professional demeanor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the guard's face, tie, and full suit details with arms slightly extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, suit jacket, and arm position.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, jacket, and straight posture with arms out.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the opposite profile, arm, and leg alignment.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal dark suit consisting of a tailored jacket and matching trousers, a white collared dress shirt, and a striped necktie. The uniform is businesslike and standardized, with no visible hat or accessories, and black formal shoes complete the attire.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly extended outward and feet shoulder-width apart, projecting a neutral and attentive demeanor.
